ShortDescription.Value: District Note is a simple mod that allows you to write a text note in the District panel.

Publish.LongDescription:
# DistrictNote License : MIT
source :
##Features
* The idea is to allow the player to enter text within the District panel. For each District entity, a text field of up to 3,800 characters is available for input, saving, and editing. The mod can be disabled without affecting the save file.
##Code: This mod was created with the help of ClaudeAI. I am not a professional developer, just a player with basic C# knowledge who wanted to add a feature I felt was missing, similar to what was found in SimCity 4 back in the day. I do not seek any payment or praise for this project, and I authorize anyone to modify it.
##Limitations
The mod is far from perfect; for instance, I haven't yet managed to implement a scrollbar for the text area, though the text can still be navigated using the arrow keys.
I haven't encountered any major bugs, aside from a rare, minor issue where hotkeys trigger while typing during active gameplay; I therefore recommend typing your text while the game is paused.
##Compatibility
Tested with various mods; no issues have been encountered so far.
